category_sources: source_facts.description says runtime developer console, interactive debugger and REPL for PHP; official site uses the same positioning.
display_name_sources: Official site heading is Psy SH; project/repository and package name are PsySH / psysh.
docs_sources: Official site lists the PsySH Wiki, Configuration Guide, Built-in Commands, and GitHub repository as documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/bobthecow/psysh; per instruction, repo not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official site features list REPL, interactive debugger, doc/show commands, and PHP framework integrations.
